effect.subject: all_caps
effect.reserved_for: campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE', chart/infographic headlines, and brand name LISRAYA only

rule_text: [GENERAL] Do not use ALL CAPS for body copy, buttons, or subheads other than the sanctioned cases (campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE', chart/infographic headlines).
intent: Reserve ALL CAPS for approved uses only, keeping emphasis meaningful.
summary: Avoid ALL CAPS in body copy, buttons, subheads except campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE' and chart/infographic headlines.
